text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week misses her training. It's nighttime
when I finally get ahold of her.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry I couldn't make it to training!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Actually, Suzuka had a race today, and I really
wanted to watch her run, so...
choice_data_list:
Well, I suppose watching a race also helps you
learn.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
choice_data_list: Did you learn anything from Suzuka's race?
Did you learn anything from Suzuka's race?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I realized her Runaway method is something that
no one else can imitate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but wonder whether she really learned
anything if the method can't be imitated.
